details: The agent successfully navigated to https://github.com/facebook/react/issues, retrieved the open issue count (824), and reported 5 specific issue titles from the page. The titles are real and verifiable from the page snapshot: #36209 'Suggestion: MCP Developer Tools Integration for React Development', #36207 'Bug:', #36206 'Bug:', #36205 'Bug:', and #36201 'Rename DO_NOT_USE_OR_YOU_WILL_BE_FIRED_EXPERIMENTAL_IMG_SRC_TYPES...'. The agent also verified that the 'Bug:' titles were indeed the actual titles by navigating to issue #36207 directly. The open issue count of 824 is in the hundreds as expected. The agent correctly identified and reported what it found rather than hallucinating data.
